style_note: Tile Africa's own name for what the UI placeholder called 'Classic' - opulent finishes, statement freestanding baths, polished porcelain, marble-look surfaces, brushed gold accents.
known_gaps: Tile Africa's Luxe Living bathroom sub-listing has no tiles, towel rails or built-in baths - those categories were style-matched from their wider catalogue on 2026-07-10 (polished porcelain, marble-look Statuario, brushed gold rails) - same approach as Modern Metro's wall tiles. Prices are real and current; the style pairing is our curation, not Tile Africa's tagging.
Built-in baths come from the general built-in baths category - Tile Africa does not tag any built-in bath to a style collection.
Only one shower head (Hansgrohe Vernis Square) and one shower concealed mixer (Hansgrohe Logis Square) in the style's own range - each used for all three tiers.
